examples: Matches boy or boys; the regex Goo? Gle matches Gogle or Google.
We could hardly see where we were going because of all the goo on the windscreens.
Larkin: The President of WBIG is a friend of mine. I know he wants some goo new business reporters.
Details from the demo that went missing are back: such as sparking consoles and dripping goo.
Cosmetics companies are cranking out all types of men's hair goo and body spray.
